---
title: "read_counter"
author: Francesco Rivetti
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
```
{params.experiment_name}_corrected_barcode_*.fastq

```{bash}
ls *fastq | xargs wc -l | awk '{print $2, $1/4}' > corrected_reads_per_cell.txt
```

```{r plot}
df <- read.table('corrected_reads_per_cell.txt', sep = ' ')
# remove total 
df <- df[-dim(df)[1],]
rownames(df) <- str_extract(df$V1, "(?<=corrected_barcode_)\\d+(?=\\.fastq)")
df
#plot
barplot(df[order(as.numeric(row.names(df))),'V2'], 
        names.arg = rownames(df),
        main = "Distribution error-corrected reads",
        xlab = "Barcode",
        ylab = "Corrected reads",
        col = "skyblue")

```
